reports.name: Koudegolgen
reports.query:
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
        kg.STATION              AS stationsCode,
        st.OMSCHRIJVING         AS station,
        kg.VOLGNR               AS volgnr,
        kg.BEGIN                AS begin,
        kg.EINDE                AS einde,
        kg.DAGEN                AS dagen,
        kg.STRENG               AS streng,
        kg.TMIN                 AS tmin,
        kg.HELLMANN             AS hellmann
    FROM koudegolven kg
    JOIN stations st ON st.CODE = kg.STATION
) _t
WHERE 1=1
<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY begin
